parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Prep create').item.json.parent_name }}! 🎉

Welcome to Super Sheldon. We've received your payment for {{ $('Prep create').item.json.student_name }}'s {{ $('Prep create').item.json.course }} classes.

Tap to confirm your tutor and class timing:
http://localhost:3000/confirm/{{ $('Prep create').item.json.magic_token }}

— Team Super Sheldon

parameters.subject: =Welcome to Super Sheldon — confirm your class for {{ $('Prep create').item.json.student_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Welcome to Super Sheldon 🎉

Hi {{ $('Prep create').item.json.parent_name }},

We've received your payment for {{ $('Prep create').item.json.student_name }}'s {{ $('Prep create').item.json.course }} classes ({{ $('Prep create').item.json.classes_count }} sessions).

Tap below to pick your tutor and starting time:

Confirm my class →

— Team Super Sheldon

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, magic_token: $('Prep create').item.json.magic_token, enrollment_id: $('Airtable: Create Enrollment').item.json.id } }}
